name: Perry
title: Admiral of Debt
description: The eyes of the young Perry always sparkled at the sight of the exotic treasures and minerals her father brought back from his expeditions. She worked hard toward her dream, determined to one day become an adventurer who would explore unknown lands. A year ago, she finally obtained government approval and set out as an adventurer. But around that time, her father, Ganon, vanished without a word, leaving no trace.

localization.name: Water Barrage
localization.description: 200% damage to 2 enemies. If an enemy on the battlefield is sleeping, deals 400% damage instead to both targets. This attack ignores damage reduction effects, skin passive skills and the Counter Stance status effect. Heals the user for 100% of total damage dealt.

localization.name: Sleep Torrent
localization.description:
Removes all Sleep wards and Burn status effects (including Mega Healing Burn) from enemy units on the battlefield.

Then grants 1 random enemy a burn ward, and the Sleep status effect for 200TU, even if they have already slept while on the battlefield. This will overwrite other status effects on that unit. This effect triggers 4 times.

If no enemies were sleeping at the start of the turn, the user will immediately get the next turn. Usable if less than 2 enemies on the battlefield are sleeping. Usable 10 times per battle.
localization.selected:
Removes Sleep wards, Burn & grants Sleep
(Will overwrite other status effects)

localization.name: Concussive Blow
localization.description:
300% damage to 1 enemy, and then grants that enemy the Deep Sleep status effect for 100TU, even if they have already slept while on the battlefield, and heals all allies for 800% of the user's attack. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects. This skill becomes locked for 50TU after use.

Deep Sleep will overwrite other status effects, cannot be overwritten by Burn or Sleep status effects, and cannot be Purified.
localization.selected:
300% damage, grants Deep Sleep
(Will overwrite other status effects)

localization.name: Crashing Anchor
localization.description: 200% damage to all enemies. 500% damage instead to sleeping targets. This attack ignores damage reduction effects, skin passive skills and the Counter Stance status effect. Unlocked each time the user damages an enemy with another attack. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield.
localization.selected: Up to 500% damage, ignores damage reduction

localization.name: Tides of Fortune
localization.description:
This unit cannot be burned. This unit's attacks will not wake sleeping enemies.

This unit has 40% damage reduction from attacks, plus 10% for each burning or sleeping enemy on the battlefield (up to 80% max).

When this unit takes damage from an attack, if there are 2 or more enemies that are burning or sleeping on the battlefield, this unit has a 20% chance plus 20% per Awakening (up to 100% chance if this unit has 4 Awakenings) to be immediately Purified (any negative status effects like sleep, burn or poison are removed, new status effects may still apply following this effect), and get the next turn.

When this unit enters the battlefield and at the end of each turn, if there are 2 or more enemies on the battlefield that are Fire element or have a Burn Blast or Burn Drive type active skill, this unit will become a Stun Absorber (Whenever any ally would be affected by stun, this unit takes the stun instead). At the end of each turn, if there are less than 2 enemies on the battlefield that are Fire element or have a Burn Blast or Burn Drive type active skill, this unit will stop being a Stun Absorber.

localization.name: Captain's Orders
localization.description:
If this unit would be defeated by an enemy attack or a status effect while having more than 1 HP, it instead survives with 1 HP.

Each time an ally (including this unit) gets the turn, they will heal for 20% of their max HP. If that ally is Water and survives until after the end of the turn, Allies gain 1 Spirit.

When this unit's attacks hit a sleeping, non-boss, non-Ephemeral target and that target has 1HP remaining after damage, that target is immediately defeated (this unit is considered to have defeated that enemy with an attack). This effect ignores Revenge passive skills, Revival passive skills, and any passive skills or effects of active skills that would prevent the enemy from being defeated.

When this unit enters battle all allies will be granted Sleep Wards. After the end of this unit's first turn on the battlefield, all allies will have Burn removed and be granted Burn wards. Each Ward prevents their named effect from being applied once, then is removed. Identical Wards cannot stack.

localization.name: HP Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 1200 to this unit's max HP.

localization.name: Fire Resist Lv3
localization.description: 10% less damage from attacks by Fire units.

localization.name: Spear Mastery
localization.description: Can use weapon skills of Spears in addition to their original preferred weapon type.
